---
title: "The Hon. Francis Lionel Lydstone Colborne"
---

## The Hon. Francis Lionel Lydstone Colborne

**Dates:** (1855-1924)

### Description

second son of the 2nd Lord Seaton

### Biography

He is probably the Frank Colborne having trouble with his ears (1870) rather than his uncle General the Hon. Sir Francis Colborne (1817-1895).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 17th [1885] 
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from October 3. [1857]
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
